examples: In a reenactment scene, Khmer men working with stone grinding construction.
Memory becomes an reenactment of perception, indistinguishable from the original act of knowing.
If a reenactment and a magical working are planned, the reenactment is performed first, followed by the magical working.
The supposedly progressive Obama is leading us back into an historical reenactment of the 1930s.
Bush's doctrine of war and peace was aimed at preventing just such a reenactment of history.
